metadata.source_title: Dutch industry is further increasing production

text: Dutch industry continues to increase production. [Analysis](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/analyses/index.html). [Industry](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/industrie/index.html). 01/09/2025 • 3 minutes reading. [Albert Jan Swart](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/albert-jan-swart/index.html). The Nevi Purchasing Managers Index for Dutch industry for August came to 51.9, the same score as the previous month. There are underlying shifts. The sub-index for production rose sharply, while that for new orders fell. The number of new orders is still growing, but at a slower pace than in the previous month.

metadata.source_title: Dutch industry is further increasing production

text: The Nevi Purchasing Managers Index for Dutch industry for August came to 51.9, the same score as the previous month. There are underlying shifts. The sub-index for production rose sharply, while that for new orders fell. The number of new orders is still growing, but at a slower pace than in the previous month. The growth in the number of new export orders has virtually come to a standstill.

metadata.source_title: Dutch industry is further increasing production

text: There are underlying shifts. The sub-index for production rose sharply, while that for new orders fell. The number of new orders is still growing, but at a slower pace than in the previous month. The growth in the number of new export orders has virtually come to a standstill. This may be related to the American import duties, which have been set at 15 percent for many products.

metadata.source_title: Dutch industry is further increasing production

text: The sub-index for production rose sharply, while that for new orders fell. The number of new orders is still growing, but at a slower pace than in the previous month. The growth in the number of new export orders has virtually come to a standstill. This may be related to the American import duties, which have been set at 15 percent for many products. A rate of 50 percent even applies to steel and aluminum.

metadata.source_title: Dutch industry is further increasing production

text: The number of new orders is still growing, but at a slower pace than in the previous month. The growth in the number of new export orders has virtually come to a standstill. This may be related to the American import duties, which have been set at 15 percent for many products. A rate of 50 percent even applies to steel and aluminum. Fortunately, the European Commission and the White House announced on Thursday, August 22, that the 50 percent tariff on steel and aluminum will only apply from a certain quota.

metadata.source_title: Dutch industry is further increasing production

text: The growth in the number of new export orders has virtually come to a standstill. This may be related to the American import duties, which have been set at 15 percent for many products. A rate of 50 percent even applies to steel and aluminum. Fortunately, the European Commission and the White House announced on Thursday, August 22, that the 50 percent tariff on steel and aluminum will only apply from a certain quota. Nevertheless, the tariffs could put pressure on exports to the United States of steel and, for example, machinery.

metadata.source_title: Dutch industry is further increasing production

text: This may be related to the American import duties, which have been set at 15 percent for many products. A rate of 50 percent even applies to steel and aluminum. Fortunately, the European Commission and the White House announced on Thursday, August 22, that the 50 percent tariff on steel and aluminum will only apply from a certain quota. Nevertheless, the tariffs could put pressure on exports to the United States of steel and, for example, machinery. Exports to Germany of car parts, for example, are also likely to be under pressure.

metadata.source_title: Dutch industry is further increasing production

text: A rate of 50 percent even applies to steel and aluminum. Fortunately, the European Commission and the White House announced on Thursday, August 22, that the 50 percent tariff on steel and aluminum will only apply from a certain quota. Nevertheless, the tariffs could put pressure on exports to the United States of steel and, for example, machinery. Exports to Germany of car parts, for example, are also likely to be under pressure. Chip machines and pharmaceutical products are currently excluded, but it is possible that President Donald Trump will introduce separate tariffs for these sectors.

metadata.source_title: Dutch industry is further increasing production

text: Fortunately, the European Commission and the White House announced on Thursday, August 22, that the 50 percent tariff on steel and aluminum will only apply from a certain quota. Nevertheless, the tariffs could put pressure on exports to the United States of steel and, for example, machinery. Exports to Germany of car parts, for example, are also likely to be under pressure. Chip machines and pharmaceutical products are currently excluded, but it is possible that President Donald Trump will introduce separate tariffs for these sectors. However, it has been agreed with the European Union that these rates will not exceed 15 percent.

Some suppliers say they are experiencing a significant drop in orders from the chip machine manufacturer from Veldhoven. text: The demand for older machines in particular is disappointing, according to one of ASML's suppliers. ASML's latest machines probably benefit more from the growing demand for advanced chips for use in data centers for AI applications. Older chip machines, for example, are used to produce chips for the automotive industry, which is suffering from the trade war. The market could improve in the fourth quarter or next year, a purchasing manager said. text: ASML's latest machines probably benefit more from the growing demand for advanced chips for use in data centers for AI applications. Older chip machines, for example, are used to produce chips for the automotive industry, which is suffering from the trade war. The market could improve in the fourth quarter or next year, a purchasing manager said. On the other hand, it is also not inconceivable that demand for older machines is better than expected, but that ASML limits its own inventories to increase profitability. In the past, it has often happened that suppliers complained about declining orders, and afterwards it turned out that ASML had delivered more machines to customers.

Suppliers may also be affected by ASML's ambitious cost reduction targets in the coming years. Many suppliers are redesigning parts of ASML machines to produce them at significantly lower costs.
